a.xlink:title: Generates and returns a unique type index for a specific type.

Gets the StateTypeId for a specific component type.
Constructs a CommandTypeId with a specific value.
Constructs and attaches a component to this entity.
Constructs a ComponentTypeId with a specific ID value.
Constructs and attaches a component to an entity.
Retrieves a component for the given entity.
Returns the SparseSet for a component type.
Returns the SparseSet for a component type (const).
Checks whether an entity has a specific component.
Removes a specific component from an entity.
Registers a component type with the reflection system.
Returns existing component or creates a new one.
Returns existing component or creates a new one.
Clones all components from source entity to target entity.
Enables or disables a component by type ID.
Returns raw void pointer to a component.
Destroys an entity and invalidates its handle.
Checks whether a resource of type T is registered.
Creates and registers an owning resource.
Registers a non-owning CommandHandler reference.
Returns a reference to a registered resource.
Returns a reference to a registered resource.
Constructs a ResourceTypeId with a specific value.
Returns a pointer to a registered resource, or nullptr.
Returns a pointer to a registered resource, or nullptr.
Returns the number of inactive objects in the pool.
Returns the unique type identifier for this score type.
Processes death events and issues score commands.
